title: AntiRank
description: AntiRank hides useless and spammy Hypixel chat messages, primarily rank begging.
body:
AntiRank blocks the annoying "stuff" on Hypixel:

- people asking/begging for ranks
- people asking to join their party
- people promoting their guild
- mvp/mvp+ lobby joins

In the future, AntiRank will likely get:
- configuration
- more filters for rank begging

This is a very lightweight (~25kb) zero-dependency mod that supports the latest Minecraft version. Easy to install, easy to use. There is no configuration, yet.

*AntiRank will always support Minecraft versions from the latest version back as long as no code has to be changed for it to be supported. The current earliest supported version is 1.20.5, because the Java version was updated to 21 after 1.21.4.*
